case_title: THOMAS PAINE PARTNERS,LTD, A CALIF LIMITED PARTNER vs. BOLDEN, JOANNE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDEN, JOANNE BOLDEN, KENNETH NEELY, DIMARCO NEELY, ISSAC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1149 TURK ST, S.F, CA. 94115 $687.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,187.00, JUDGMENT STAYED PROVIDED DEFENDANTS HONOR TERMS OF STIPULATION.

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS PAINE PARTNERS,LTD, A CALIF LIMITED PARTNER COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-01-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS PAINE PARTNERS,LTD, A CALIF LIMITED PARTNER AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDEN, JOANNE BOLDEN, KENNETH NEELY, DIMARCO NEELY, ISSAC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLDEN, JOANNE BOLDEN, KENNETH NEELY, DIMARCO NEELY, ISSAC

10:00AM DEPT 5, JUDGE WICK. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFTS KENNETH BOLDEN & ISAAC NEELY PRESENT, DEFTS JOANNE BOLDEN & DIMARCO NEELY FAILING TO APPEAR. STIPULATION REACHED & READ INTO THE RECORD.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLDEN, JOANNE BOLDEN, KENNETH NEELY, DIMARCO NEELY, ISSAC ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
